name: GetProductsResponseModel
description: GetProductsResponseModel schema from MarginEdge Public API

nextPage.description: Unique key for the next page of results

centralProductId.description: Identifier of the product across all restaurants in MarginEdge, if applicable. Not all products have a central identifier.

latestPrice.description: Most recent price of this product based on purchasing data

reportByUnit.description: Unit that this product is reported by in MarginEdge (e.g., EACH, POUND)

taxExempt.description: Indicates whether this product is marked tax exempt

companyConceptProductId.description: Identifier of the product unique within the company concept this restaurant belongs to

percentAllocation.description: Percent allocation of the product to this category

categoryId.description: Identifier of a category to which this product belongs

itemCount.description: Number of vendor items assigned to this product (in this restaurant)
